meta.poznamky: Rozhozené bloky. Student musí sestavit opakuj(5){forward(100), right(144)}.

cms.task_text: Bloky pro kreslení [hlp]pěticípé hvězdy[/hlp] jsou rozhozeny. Sestavte je správně!
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="22" y="26"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block><block type="turtle_right" x="180" y="120"><field name="ANGLE">144</field></block><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="60" y="230"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></shadow></value></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">144</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
